auth.phonePrompt: Enter your phone number to receive a one-time code
auth.otpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code we sent you

kyc.title: Verify your identity
kyc.consent: I consent to my NIN/BVN being used solely to confirm I am one real person, so each verified person votes once.

vote.already: You have already voted in this poll
vote.receipt: Your vote was recorded. Keep your receipt to verify it was counted.
vote.secrecy: Your receipt proves you voted without revealing your choice.

transparency.methodology: One verified human, one vote. Results are recomputable from a signed export and anchored in a tamper-evident audit log.
